sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36707" key="e(ca/mitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑξάμῐτος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n36707.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of six strands,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θρίξ</foreign> prob. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.702</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollonid.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
